name: Precursor Memory Shard
description: Fragmented data crystal with compressed navigation traces from a lost polity.
lore_hook: Suggests non-human relay infrastructure predating known empires.

name: Null Lens Fragment
description: Damaged field lens section that manipulates local EM propagation.
lore_hook: Often linked to abandoned stealth observatories in deep sectors.

name: Orbital Choir Array
description: Resonant ring segment tuned for synchronized long-range signal phasing.
lore_hook: May have coordinated autonomous fleets across interstellar baselines.

name: Temporal Drift Key
description: Metastable lock element with anomalous tick drift under high-energy scans.
lore_hook: Field notes imply interaction with extreme gravitational shear corridors.

name: Axiom Core Prism
description: Prismatic core with nonlinear phase transitions under coherent beam load.
lore_hook: Used by archivists to encode scientific treaties in tamper-resistant form.
